posts.title: Git 代理设置
posts.text: Git默认clone或push速度很慢，原因你懂的，下面以shadowsocks做代理例子，输入以下命令即可1234$ git config --global http.proxy 'socks5://127.0.0.1:1080'$ git config --global https.proxy 'socks5://127.0.0.1:1080'# 这样就OK了，可以输入以下命令查看是否设置成功$ git config --list 如果想取消代理设置，输入以下命令即可12$ git config --global --unset http.proxy$ git config --global --unset https.proxy 这样就可以愉快的用Git啦。

posts.title: Git SSH Key 生成步骤
posts.text: Git是分布式的代码管理工具，远程的代码管理是基于SSH的，所以要使用远程的Git则需要SSH的配置。github的SSH配置如下： 一、设置Git的user name和email：123# 输入你自己的用户名和邮箱$ git config --global user.name "ymfeelcn"$ git config --global user.email "ymfeelcn@gmail.com" 二、生成SSH密钥过程：1.查看是否已经有了ssh密钥： 123$ cd ~/.ssh# 如果没有密钥则不会有此文件夹,为以下提示bash: cd: /c/Users/Administrator/.ssh: No such file or directory 注意：如果你已经生成了密钥，想重新生成，则直接删除 .ssh 这个目录即可，最好先自己备份哦。 2.开始生成密钥：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829# 这里填写自己的邮箱$ ssh-keygen -t rsa -C "ymfeelcn@gmail.com"# 会出现以下提示Generating public/private rsa key pair.Enter file in which to save the key (/c/Users/Administrator/.ssh/id_rsa): # 按回车Created directory '/c/Users/Administrator/.ssh'.Enter passphrase (empty for no passphrase): # 如果想设置密码则写密码，若想空则回车Enter same passphrase again: # 如果想设置密码则写密码，若想空则回车# 出现以下则说明正常生成啦Your identification has been saved in /c/Users/Administrator/.ssh/id_rsa.Your public key has been saved in /c/Users/Administrator/.ssh/id_rsa.pub.The key fingerprint is:SHA256:TYuNEGgM+UBHPE2pcI0MDs/GRr2iHwr473/fDJBev7s ymfeelcn@gmail.comThe key's randomart image is:+---[RSA 2048]----+|..=Xo*o. || B+.@ +. || B* +. . || o. + . B . ||.. . S = ||+ . . o . ||.+ . . . . ||. o . + . || oo... .. Eo |+----[SHA256]-----+Administrator@PC-Ming MINGW64 ~ (master)$ cd ~/.ssh$ lsid_rsa id_rsa.pub 3.最后得到了两个文件：id_rsa和id_rsa.pub 三、登录GitHub设置SSH1.打开 GitHub , 用自己的账号登录，然后打开用户设置，SSH and GPG Keys，添加密钥，步骤如下：Setting->SSH and GPG Keys->New SSH Key2.表单里 Title 名称随便写，自己能分辨就行，Key 则用记事本打开刚刚生成的 id_rsa.pub 文件，把里面的内容复制进入，然后点 Add SSH Key 按钮，即可12345678Administrator@PC-Ming MINGW64 ~ (master)$ cd ~/.sshAdministrator@PC-Ming MINGW64 ~ (master)$ lsid_rsa id_rsa.pubAdministrator@PC-Ming MINGW64 ~ (master)$ cat id_rsa.pubssh-rsa AAAAB3NzaC1yc2EAAAADAQABAAABAQDEwf... # 这里就省略啦。 四、测试SSH配置是否成功按下面操作即可，如果出现了你的用户名，则表示成功啦。123456789# 输入以下命令，等待一会$ ssh git@github.com# 若出现以下提示，不要着急，输入 yes即可The authenticity of host 'github.com (192.30.253.113)' can't be established.RSA key fingerprint is SHA256:nThbg6kXUpJWGl7E1IGOCspRomTxdCARLviKw6E5SY8.Are you sure you want to continue connecting (yes/no)? # yes# 出现你的用户名，则表示成功啦Hi ymfeelcn! You've successfully authenticated, but GitHub does not provide shell access.Connection to github.com closed. GitHub配置SSH Keys就全部OK啦。

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
